name: codex-array-command-bypass-permissions-allow
doc: Array-command twin of scenario 26 step 3: Codex's argv-array `tool_input.command` (`["bash","-lc",<script>]`) unwraps through commandToString to the same string evaluate.ts sees — so the neverApproval exemption fires identically regardless of the wire shape. Pre-fix (scenario 26), this exact `git commit` argv array denied under Codex's ask-downgrade; under approval_policy=never it now auto-approves with the same visible notice as the string form (scenario 28 step 1).

steps.doc: `git commit` as an argv array + permission_mode bypassPermissions — commandToString unwraps it to "git commit -m test", RALPH_SAFE/isSingleCommand/GIT_BLOCKED all pass, so it auto-approves exactly like the string form.
